text: The department may adopt rules and policies for the maintenance and use of the department’s automated registration and titling system.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.021 — Rules and Policies

The department may adopt rules and policies for the maintenance and use of the department’s automated registration and titling system.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 4.04, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The department may adopt rules and policies for the maintenance and use of the department’s automated registration and titling system.
